name: Utah forklift accident workers comp vs personal injury lawsuit?
description: Comp no-fault basics; PI for pain/suffering vs others.[3]

mainEntity.name: Utah forklift accident workers comp vs personal injury lawsuit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault basics; PI for pain/suffering vs others.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp: quick no-fault medical/wages; PI: fuller damages but prove negligence, only vs third-parties.** Exclusive remedy limits employer suits.[3] Key factors: Comp first, then PI for extras like pain; lien negotiation needed.[3] PI riskier/higher potential.
